entries.notes:
WORKING APPROACH FOR NATUURPUNT VLAAMS-BRABANT SCRAPING:

URL Structure:
- Base URL: https://www.natuurpunt.be/agenda?f%5B0%5D=province%3A187&page=X (where X is page number, 0-indexed)
- Individual event URLs contain date parameter: /agenda/event-name-id?date=DD/MM/YYYY

HTML Structure:
- Events container: div with class='views-element-container'
- Individual events: div with class='views-row'
- Event links: <a> tags with href containing '/agenda/'
- No visible pagination element on all pages, need to check multiple page numbers

Event Data Extraction:
- Date: Extract from URL parameter ?date=DD/MM/YYYY format
- Title: From link text or following h2/h3/h4 elements, needs whitespace cleanup
- Location: Parse from text using pattern "(Wandeling|Workshop|Excursie|Lezing|Activiteit)\s+([^\\n]+)" and take first word
- Time: Must fetch individual event pages and search for patterns like "14:00 tot 17:00" or "14:00"
- Default time: 10:00 AM if no time found
- Default duration: 3 hours if no end time specified

Pagination:
- Check pages 0-19 (found events on all these pages)
- Stop when 3 consecutive empty pages found
- Each page has ~20 events
- Remove duplicates by URL (some events may appear on multiple pages)

Date Filtering:
- Only include events from today onwards (skip past events)
- Dutch month abbreviations: jan, feb, mrt, apr, mei, jun, jul, aug, sep, okt, nov, dec

Technical Details:
- Use timezone Europe/Brussels
- Generate UIDs using MD5 hash of title+start+location
- Include event URL in calendar entries
- Sort events by date for better calendar organization
- Total events found: 392 unique events covering March-September 2026

Working Python Libraries:
- requests, BeautifulSoup, icalendar, pytz, datetime, re, hashlib

Success Metrics:
- Successfully found 392 events across 20 pages
- Events span from 2026-03-28 to 2026-09-13 
- Proper time extraction from individual event pages
- Generated valid .ics file (160KB) compatible with Google Calendar/Apple Calendar
